creator: h.eichmann@gmx.de
text:
Hi!

First of all: thanks for the patch. What I dislike is, that the font is not 
cached any more. This might make the deinstall happy, but not the user. 

In the port  x11-fonts/XFree86-4-font100dpi I fond an alternate approach, 
which works fine here. I suggest to apply this and see, if any build 
environment reports a problem.

Heiner
